comments: Now a complete show (previously approximately half an hour was missing)
Tommy & Tony choose a track each in the latest instalment of the Staff Selection
Tommy intimates that they were hoping to record Accept in session in Germany but this had not happened (the session was eventually broadcast on 19th August 1983

sessions.details: First TX 1983-04-01 (features tracks from his Highly Strung LP)

track_listing.track: 'Get Up Get Angry' (LP-Get Up) Epic US Import
'Princess Of The Dawn' (LP-Restless & Wild) Heavy Metal Worldwide

'Never Reach The Stars' (4 track cassette only EP) GZO Later in the year they changed their name to Underground Zero to avoid confusion with a London based R’n’B band of the same name. They recorded a FRS session as Underground Zero, broadcast 17th August 1984
'Eye Of The Storm' (LP-V/A - The Friday Rock Show) BBC
